title: malapoenna neesiana
intro: Malapoenna neesiana, also known as the "Yellow Bitter Apple," is a plant species belonging to the family Sapindaceae. The medicinal properties of Malapoenna neesiana are attributed to its leaves and bark, which contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Malapoenna neesiana include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Malapoenna neesiana are typically made from the dried leaves and bark, which can be used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
